message:
feat(firecracker): add graceful shutdown via SendCtrlAltDel

Update StopVM to try graceful shutdown via the Firecracker API socket
before falling back to SIGTERM/SIGKILL. This allows the guest OS to
perform a clean shutdown when possible.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
